summary: Phase 2.0 end-to-end testing for Mittari.fi — full backend + frontend pass. Backend pytest 17/17 green (10 regression + 7 new Phase 2.0 settings tests covering public GET, admin auth gate, PUT persistence, null-clear). Frontend Home verified: hero-capture-input + hero-capture-submit + hero-capture-telegram all render; dial-history-chart sparkline present; SocialProofTicker renders 5 testids (section + 4 cells); ActivityFeedInline shows 6 events initially and ticks up to 7 after ~30s wait (auto-update confirmed); 6 moment-share-* buttons, 6 session-progress-* tiles. hero-share-dial opens share-preview-modal with download button; moment share opens same modal. SignupToast appears at ~12s with data-testid signup-toast and signup-toast-dismiss closes it. Back-office /back-office shows back-office-auth gate; wrong token shows 'Wrong token.' text; correct token 'mittari-admin' reveals back-office-settings-form (testids back-office-telegram-input + back-office-save-btn); SAVE click shows transient 'SAVED' confirmation; reload (token persisted in localStorage 'mittari-admin-token') re-shows form pre-filled with 'https://t.me/mittarifi'. After save, Home hero-capture-telegram becomes enabled with text 'SUBSCRIBE VIA TELEGRAM' (was 'TELEGRAM — COMING SOON' disabled before). PersistentCapture on /striimaajat shows persistent-capture-desktop on 1920px and persistent-capture-mobile on 390px with persistent-capture-telegram enabled. Bilingual EN/FI toggle still works. All regression routes (/kasinot, /striimaajat, /menetelma, /peli, /viikon-kortti) load with 0 error elements. Dial-large renders without runtime errors.

verified_features.backend_public_settings: PASS — GET /api/settings/public returns {telegram_channel} only (no updated_at leak), 200 no auth
verified_features.backend_admin_auth_gate: PASS — GET/PUT /api/admin/settings without token → 401; wrong token → 401; correct X-Admin-Token=mittari-admin → 200
verified_features.backend_admin_put_persistence: PASS — PUT persists telegram_channel; subsequent public GET + admin GET both reflect new value; null-clear works
verified_features.backend_regression: PASS — /api/, /api/dial, /api/dial/states, /api/signup, /api/predictions all still 200 with correct shapes
verified_features.home_hero_capture: PASS — hero-capture-input, hero-capture-submit, hero-capture-telegram all visible and have correct disabled/enabled state based on settings
verified_features.home_dial_history_chart: PASS — dial-history-chart sparkline renders below cockpit
verified_features.home_hero_share: PASS — hero-share-dial opens share-preview-modal with download button; close works
verified_features.home_social_proof_ticker: PASS — 5 social-proof-* testids render (section + 4 cells: SUBSCRIBERS 4,283 / DIAL WATCHERS 217 / FORUM HEAT 62° / WEEKLY GROWTH +1.83%)
verified_features.home_activity_feed_inline: PASS — activity-feed-section visible; 6 initial activity-event-* cards; grew to 7 after ~25s wait — auto-update confirmed
verified_features.home_moment_share: PASS — 6 moment-share-* buttons; clicking opens share-preview-modal
verified_features.layout_signup_toast: PASS — signup-toast appears bottom-left after ~12s; signup-toast-dismiss closes it
verified_features.back_office_token_gate: PASS — back-office-auth + back-office-token-input + back-office-auth-submit; wrong token shows 'Wrong token.'
verified_features.back_office_settings_form: PASS — correct token reveals back-office-settings-form (telegram input + save btn). Save shows SAVED confirmation. Reload re-loads pre-filled value (localStorage token persistence works)
verified_features.telegram_button_dynamic_state: PASS — Disabled with 'TELEGRAM — COMING SOON' before URL set; enabled with 'SUBSCRIBE VIA TELEGRAM' after admin PUT
verified_features.persistent_capture_desktop: PASS — /striimaajat at 1920w shows persistent-capture-desktop with persistent-capture-telegram enabled
verified_features.live_tile_session_progress: PASS — 6 session-progress-* bars (one per live tile)
verified_features.dial_breathing_no_errors: PASS — dial-large renders; no runtime exceptions on home
verified_features.bilingual_toggle: PASS — EN/FI buttons clickable and switch UI strings
verified_features.regression_routes: PASS — /kasinot, /striimaajat, /menetelma, /peli, /viikon-kortti all load with 0 error elements

action_items: Carryover from iteration_3 (still unfixed): index.html title 'Emergent | Fullstack App' + meta description 'A product of emergent.sh' — not Mittari branded.
Carryover from iteration_3 (still unfixed): console emits 'SVG attribute height: Expected length, auto' warning ~3x on each page load. Non-blocking but pollutes console.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings stored in Mongo under {_id: 'site'} string key — works but breaks the convention used elsewhere (uuid id field). Fine for a singleton, but worth a code comment explaining why.
require_admin reads BACK_OFFICE_TOKEN at request time (os.environ.get inside the dep) — correct (allows env reload). Good.
/api/admin/settings PUT returns the full settings doc including updated_at; /api/settings/public correctly filters to only telegram_channel — confirmed no admin-only fields leak to public.

Frontend stores admin token in localStorage 'mittari-admin-token' in plaintext — acceptable for an internal/back-office tool with shared static token, but flag this if security review wants it gone before public launch.

TelegramSubscribeButton fetches /api/settings/public on mount only — won't reactively update if admin changes URL in another tab. A 30-60s poll or window 'storage' event would tighten it (low priority).

Dial-large appears twice in DOM (count=2) — likely one for the cockpit and one inside the share-preview-modal off-screen renderer for html2canvas. Verify duplicate IDs aren't an issue (data-testid duplication can break automation later).
Backend has no test for SettingsPayload schema rejection (e.g., huge string, invalid type). Pydantic Optional[str] is permissive — consider URL validation (HttpUrl) for telegram_channel.
After-save SAVED confirmation only shows transient state without auto-revert to SAVE label visible (button stays in saved state). UX is fine; just note the button reverts only on subsequent edit.
test_credentials: Back-office admin token: mittari-admin (header X-Admin-Token, also entered in /back-office UI). Persisted in localStorage key 'mittari-admin-token'.
seed_data_creation: DB has settings.{_id:'site', telegram_channel:'https://t.me/mittarifi', updated_at:...} after testing. Pytest re-inserted TEST_minimal@, TEST_full@, TEST_pred@ signups + 3 prediction docs. End state of telegram_channel is left as 'https://t.me/mittarifi' (per brief — both null and a value are acceptable end states).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2.0 verified end-to-end. Important testid discoveries (these names differ slightly from the request spec): back-office auth uses back-office-auth-submit (not back-office-token-submit); back-office form uses back-office-telegram-input + back-office-save-btn (not back-office-save). After save, the SAVED confirmation appears on the same button (button label flips from SAVE → SAVED with check icon) — pick it up in <500ms after click. SocialProofTicker uses testids prefixed social-proof-* (5 total — wrapper + 4 cells). ActivityFeed cards use activity-event-* and the section is activity-feed-section. Moment share buttons: moment-share-* (6 found, generic indices not slugged). Hero share modal + moment share modal both share-preview-modal selector and share-preview-close to dismiss. Telegram button: hero-capture-telegram on home, persistent-capture-telegram on inner pages — both flip from disabled 'TELEGRAM — COMING SOON' to enabled 'SUBSCRIBE VIA TELEGRAM' based on /api/settings/public. signup-toast + signup-toast-dismiss work; toast fires at ~12s. Backend admin endpoints all gated on X-Admin-Token header equal to env BACK_OFFICE_TOKEN ('mittari-admin'). DB persists under db.settings {_id:'site'}. To reset: PUT /api/admin/settings with {telegram_channel: null}.
